debug_info.goal:
p : вДХ
e : Expression p
ae : AffineExpression p
вКҐ some ae = AffineExpression.ofExpression? p e вЖТ AffineExpression.eval p ae = e.eval

failed_attempts:
induction e generalizing ae <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at *
  case const n =>
    intro h; injection h with h; subst h
    ext; simp [AffineExpression.eval, Std.TreeMap.foldl_empty]; rfl
  case var s =>
    intro h; injection h with h; subst h
    ext; simp [AffineExpression.eval]
  case add e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
    intro h; split at h <;> try contradiction
    case h_1 v1 v2 h1 h2 =>
      injection h with h; subst h
      ext
      simp [AffineExpression.eval, Add.add, ih1 _ h1.symm, ih2 _ h2.symm, mul_add]
  case mul e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
    intro h; split at h <;> try contradiction
    case h_1 v1 v2 h1 h2 =>
      unfold AffineExpression.mul? at h
      split at h <;> try contradiction
      all_goals
        rename_i c hc
        injection h with h; subst h
        ext
        simp [AffineExpression.eval, AffineExpression.mul_by_number, mul_add]
        try rw [ih1 _ h1.symm]; try rw [ih2 _ h2.symm]
        have : вИА e c, AffineExpression.toConstant? e = some c вЖТ AffineExpression.eval e = fun _ => c := by
          intros e c hc; unfold AffineExpression.toConstant? at hc
          split at hc <;> try contradiction; simp at hc; subst c
          ext; simp [AffineExpression.eval]; rfl
        rw [this _ _ hc]
        try simp [mul_comm]

induction e generalizing ae

    simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, Add.add, ih1 a1 h1, ih2 a2 h2]

    rename_i a1 a2 h1 h2

    split at h <;> try contradiction
    all_goals
      rename_i c hc

      unfold AffineExpression.toConstant? at hc
      split_ifs at hc with hempty <;> try contradiction
      simp at hc; subst c
      funext env

induction e generalizing ae <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
  case const n =>
    injection h with h; subst ae
    simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, Std.TreeMap.foldl_empty]
  case var x =>
    injection h with h; subst ae
    simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, Std.TreeMap.foldl_insert, Std.TreeMap.foldl_empty]
  case add e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
    split at h <;> try contradiction
    injection h with h; subst ae
    simp [Expression.eval, ih1 _ вАє_вАЇ, ih2 _ вАє_вАЇ, AffineExpression.eval, Add.add]
    sorry -- Requires Std.TreeMap lemmas (e.g. foldl_mergeWith) not present in context
  case mul e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
    simp [mul?] at h
    split at h <;> try contradiction
    split at h <;> try contradiction
    all_goals
      injection h with h; subst ae
      simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?] at вАє_вАЇ
      split at вАє_вАЇ <;> try contradiction
      rename_i h_empty
      simp [Expression.eval, вЖР ih1 _ вАє_вАЇ, вЖР ih2 _ вАє_вАЇ, AffineExpression.eval, mul_by_number]
      rw [Std.TreeMap.isEmpty_eq_true_iff] at h_empty
      simp [h_empty, Std.TreeMap.foldl_empty]
      sorry -- Requires Std.TreeMap lemmas (e.g. foldl_map) not present in context

induction e generalizing ae <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at *
  case const n =>
    intro h; cases h; subst ae; rfl
  case var s =>
    intro h; cases h; subst ae; rfl
  case add e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
    split <;> try contradiction
    split <;> try contradiction
    intro h; cases h; subst ae
    funext env
    simp [Expression.eval, AffineExpression.eval, Add.add]
    rw [вЖРih1 _ rfl, вЖРih2 _ rfl]
    -- Assuming Std.TreeMap or context provides lemmas for foldl distribution
    sorry
  case mul e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
    split <;> try contradiction
    split <;> try contradiction
    simp [mul?]
    split
    next n1 eq1 =>
      intro h; cases h; subst ae
      funext env
      simp [Expression.eval, mul_by_number, AffineExpression.eval]
      rw [вЖРih1 _ rfl, вЖРih2 _ rfl]
      simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?] at eq1
      split at eq1 <;> simp at eq1; subst n1
      -- Assuming simp handles ring ops and foldl distribution
      sorry
    next =>
      split
      next n2 eq2 =>
        intro h; cases h; subst ae
        funext env
        simp [Expression.eval, mul_by_number, AffineExpression.eval]
        rw [вЖРih1 _ rfl, вЖРih2 _ rfl]
        simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?] at eq2
        split at eq2 <;> simp at eq2; subst n2
        sorry
      next => contradiction

induction e generalizing ae with
  | const n =>
    intro h
    injection h with h; subst ae
    funext
    simp [AffineExpression.eval, Std.TreeMap.foldl_empty]
  | var x =>
    intro h
    injection h with h; subst ae
    funext
    simp [AffineExpression.eval]
  | add e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
    intro h
    simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
    split at h <;> try contradiction
    rename_i ae1 ae2 h1 h2
    injection h with h; subst ae
    funext env
    simp [Expression.eval]
    rw [вЖР ih1 _ (Eq.symm h1), вЖР ih2 _ (Eq.symm h2)]
    simp [AffineExpression.eval, Add.add, add_mul]
    -- Assuming environment has lemmas for foldl over mergeWith or simp handles it
    sorry -- Proof relies on TreeMap properties not exposed in context
  | mul e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
    intro h
    simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
    split at h <;> try contradiction
    rename_i ae1 ae2 h1 h2
    unfold mul? at h
    split at h
    all_goals {
      try contradiction
      rename_i n heq
      injection h with h; subst ae
      funext env
      simp [Expression.eval]
      rw [вЖР ih1 _ (Eq.symm h1), вЖР ih2 _ (Eq.symm h2)]
      -- Logic to reduce constant expression evaluation
      rw [AffineExpression.toConstant?] at heq
      split_ifs at heq with hempty
      cases heq; subst n
      simp [AffineExpression.eval, hempty, Std.TreeMap.foldl_empty, mul_by_number, mul_add, mul_assoc]
      -- Assuming simp handles map/filter foldl distribution
    }

induction e generalizing ae <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at *
  case const =>
    intro h; injection h with h; subst h
    funext; simp [AffineExpression.eval, Std.TreeMap.foldl_empty]
  case var =>
    intro h; injection h with h; subst h
    funext; simp [AffineExpression.eval]
  case add e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
    split at * <;> try contradiction
    split at * <;> try contradiction
    intro h; injection h with h; subst h
    funext
    simp [AffineExpression.eval, Add.add]
    rw [ih1 _ rfl, ih2 _ rfl]
    -- Assuming map linearity lemmas are available to simp or ring
    try simp [Std.TreeMap.foldl_mergeWith, Std.TreeMap.foldl_filter]
    try ring
  case mul e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
    split at * <;> try contradiction
    split at * <;> try contradiction
    dsimp [mul?] at *
    split at *
    ¬Ј intro h; injection h with h; subst h
      rename_i h_c
      simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?] at h_c
      split at h_c <;> try contradiction
      subst h_c
      funext
      simp [AffineExpression.eval, mul_by_number, Std.TreeMap.foldl_empty]
      rw [ih1 _ rfl, ih2 _ rfl]
      ring
    ¬Ј split at *
      ¬Ј intro h; injection h with h; subst h
        rename_i h_c
        simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?] at h_c
        split at h_c <;> try contradiction
        subst h_c
        funext
        simp [AffineExpression.eval, mul_by_number, Std.TreeMap.foldl_empty]
        rw [ih1 _ rfl, ih2 _ rfl]
        ring
      ¬Ј contradiction
    ¬Ј contradiction
